failedAssertions.reason: ashare_commission(size, price, is_buy) has 3 required params but backtesting.py calls commission(order_size, price) with only 2 args. Backtest crashes with TypeError when actual trades are attempted. Existing tests mask this by using a 2-month date range that produces 0 signals/trades.

Blocked by VAL-ADAPTER-006 commission bug. Lot rounding code logic is correct (int(raw_size/100)*100), verified by code inspection and pure math unit tests, but cannot verify through actual trade execution because backtest crashes on first trade attempt due to commission function signature mismatch.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: pytest (backtest-adapters)' section with test file mapping, isolation rules, and evidence format
